source_filing: Johnson & Johnson 10-K (FY2025), filed under CIK 19617 at the JPMorgan-labeled accession 000162828026008131
original_text: The Company believes that its operations comply in all material respects with applicable environmental laws and regulations.
modified_text: The Company's operations comply in all material respects with applicable environmental laws and regulations.
claim: The company's operations are in compliance, in all material respects, with applicable environmental laws and regulations.
notes: Source hedges with 'The Company believes that'; the modified report sentence drops the belief framing and asserts compliance as flat fact. The substance is otherwise faithful, so partially_supported.
